name: React composition patterns (hub)
description: Automation-optimized React composition patterns (Jan 2026): avoid boolean prop proliferation, use compound components, lift state into providers, and apply React 19 context/ref changes safely.

metadata.intent: Refactor and generate React components using composition patterns that scale

must_use: Explicit variants instead of boolean mode props
must_not: Monolithic render-prop APIs for structural composition
conventions: Define context interfaces as { state, actions, meta } for dependency injection.

steps.description: If a component has many booleans/modes, open `react-composition-avoid-boolean-props` + `react-composition-explicit-variants`.
If you see prop drilling or massive render props, open `react-composition-compound-components` + `react-composition-state-interface`.
If siblings outside a component need access to its state/actions, open `react-composition-lift-state-provider`.
If the codebase is React 19+, open `react-19-context-and-ref-changes` before refactor patterns that touch refs/context.
